summary: Iteration 15: 405 Method Not Allowed bug fix verified. GET /api/download-all and GET /api/download-all-zip endpoints now work correctly. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright - green download button, loading state, completion state, no 405 errors.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/download-all returns count parameter in response
BACKEND: GET /api/download-all-zip with nonexistent IDs returns 404
BACKEND: GET /api/download-all-zip with valid IDs returns application/zip
BACKEND: GET /api/pdf/{uuid} returns 200 for valid PDF
BACKEND: GET /api/pdf/{uuid} returns 404 for nonexistent PDF
BACKEND: POST /api/chat 'scholarship' trigger returns pdf_urls array with 2 items (Vidyasiri + PM-KISAN)
BACKEND: pdf_urls contains pdf_url and scheme_name for each PDF
FRONTEND: Login with phone 9876543210 and OTP 1234 works
FRONTEND: Sending 'scholarship' in DEMO_MODE returns response with 2 eligible schemes
FRONTEND: Green download button appears with data-testid='pdf-download-all-btn'
FRONTEND: Button text shows 'सभी 2 फॉर्म डाउनलोड करें' with scheme names listed
FRONTEND: Clicking download button triggers download (no 405 error)
FRONTEND: Button shows completion state 'डाउनलोड पूर्ण!' after download
FRONTEND: No 405 Method Not Allowed errors in console
FRONTEND: No network request failures during download
critical_code_review_comments: 405 fix confirmed: /api/download-all and /api/download-all-zip now accept GET requests (previously POST-only)
Frontend MultiPdfDownloadBlock uses fetch() to get blobs and createObjectURL for downloads
Fallback to zip download implemented if individual downloads fail
Loading spinner and completion state working correctly
seed_data_creation: Demo mode generates 2 PDFs (Vidyasiri Scholarship + PM-KISAN) when 'scholarship' is sent
context_for_next_testing_agent: 405 bug fix verified in iteration 15. The root cause was backend endpoints /api/download-all and /api/download-all-zip were POST-only but frontend called them with GET. Now both are GET endpoints. Frontend uses fetch+blob approach for downloads with zip fallback. Green button (#16a34a) shows loading spinner during download and 'डाउनलोड पूर्ण!' on completion.

mocked_apis_list: DEMO_MODE=true - 'scholarship' triggers demo response with 2 PDFs

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: 405 Method Not Allowed when clicking multi-PDF download button
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Backend endpoints /api/download-all and /api/download-all-zip were POST-only, frontend called with GET
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Changed both endpoints to GET method
bug_fix_verification.verification: All tests pass - no 405 errors in console, download completes successfully
